title: Follow The Money Watch
description: Daily-updated Matrix Reprogrammed watch system for contracts, billionaires, contractors, AI surveillance, asset managers, foundations, NGOs, lobbying, and revolving-door power.
evidenceBoundary: A record means a source trail exists. It does not imply wrongdoing. Separate confirmed contracts, public filings, reported allegations, commentary, and speculation.
sourceDiscipline: Government procurement portals and award notices
Company SEC filings, annual reports, investor releases, and earnings transcripts
Lobbying disclosures, FEC records, OpenSecrets, and parliamentary registers
Court records, sanctions notices, regulator actions, and settlement documents
Forbes/Bloomberg billionaire indexes for wealth snapshots, treated as estimates not cash holdings
Credible journalism used only when primary records are unavailable or when controversy/public reaction is the topic

trackingLevels.name: Identity Layer
trackingLevels.purpose: Establish who or what is being tracked before interpreting power.

trackingLevels.name: Money Layer
trackingLevels.purpose: Track the direct flow of money.

trackingLevels.name: Contract Layer
trackingLevels.purpose: Map public money into private systems.
personFields: companies controlled by person with public contracts

trackingLevels.name: People Layer
trackingLevels.purpose: Identify the humans connecting money, policy and infrastructure.

trackingLevels.name: Policy / Lobbying Layer
trackingLevels.purpose: Track how money becomes rule-making or procurement advantage.

trackingLevels.name: Capability Layer
trackingLevels.purpose: Describe what power the money buys.

trackingLevels.name: Risk / Controversy Layer
trackingLevels.purpose: Separate criticism, litigation, regulation, civil-liberties issues and unsupported claims.

trackingLevels.name: Matrix Route Layer
trackingLevels.purpose: Turn the record into useful site output.

moneyScore: 5: system-shaping multi-year ceiling or national infrastructure value

watchLanes.title: Palantir Watch
watchLanes.mission: Track Palantir contracts, government customers, defence/AI/data systems, key people, investors, lobbying, criticism, and follow-the-money links.

watchLanes.title: Billionaire Watch
watchLanes.mission: Track major billionaires, wealth movements, political gravity, foundations, media ownership, AI/defence/pharma/space investments, and public-policy influence.

watchLanes.title: Contractor Watch
watchLanes.mission: Track defence, intelligence, logistics, security, health, and outsourcing contractors that turn public money into private infrastructure.

watchLanes.title: AI Surveillance Watch
watchLanes.mission: Track AI systems used in policing, borders, war, health data, benefits systems, schools, media monitoring, and financial risk scoring.

watchLanes.title: Asset Manager Watch
watchLanes.mission: Track BlackRock, Vanguard, State Street, private equity, sovereign wealth funds, and ownership overlap across defence, media, pharma, housing, and tech.

watchLanes.title: Foundation / NGO Watch
watchLanes.mission: Track billionaire foundations, public-private partnerships, health, education, digital ID, climate, censorship/disinformation projects, and influence routes.

watchLanes.title: Revolving Door Watch
watchLanes.mission: Track people moving between government, intelligence, defence contractors, banks, Big Tech, media, think tanks, NGOs, and pharma.

palantirSeedRecords.event: U.S. Army enterprise agreement consolidating software procurement, with a potential ceiling of up to $10 billion over ten years.
USDA and Palantir signed a software Blanket Purchase Agreement tied to farmer-service modernization and the National Farm Security Action Plan.
Pentagon award for Maven Smart System prototype work to help identify points of interest from multiple data streams.
NHS Federated Data Platform award to a Palantir-led group; this remains politically sensitive and is tracked as a health-data sovereignty issue.
palantirSeedRecords.sourceType: contract record plus public controversy coverage
people: civil liberties and health campaign groups

palantirSeedRecords.event: Palantir raised 2026 revenue forecast after strong U.S. government and commercial demand; U.S. government revenue was reported as sharply higher in Q1.
palantirSeedRecords.moneyValue: 2026 forecast around $7.65B-$7.66B; Q1 revenue $1.63B reported by Reuters

palantirSeedRecords.event: UK lawmakers criticised reliance on Palantir in the public sector as an unacceptable weakness and highlighted vendor-lock-in concerns around the NHS Federated Data Platform.
palantirSeedRecords.moneyValue: £330 million NHS FDP context plus wider public-sector reliance

palantirPeople.name: Alex Karp
palantirPeople.watchReason: Public face of Palantir strategy, defence-government posture, and public controversy responses.

palantirPeople.name: Peter Thiel
palantirPeople.watchReason: Founder-capital, political-network, Silicon Valley and national-security overlap.

palantirPeople.name: Joe Lonsdale
palantirPeople.watchReason: Venture, policy, AI and political-network overlap.

palantirPeople.name: Shyam Sankar
palantirPeople.watchReason: AI, defence and technical implementation voice.

palantirPeople.name: David Glazer
palantirPeople.watchReason: Revenue, margin, forecast and investor-signal tracking.

billionaireWatchFields: Name and primary source of wealth
Daily net-worth movement and wealth-estimate source
AI, defence, surveillance, space, pharma, media, banking, energy and housing exposure
Political donations, PACs, lobbying links, adviser roles and public-policy interventions
Foundations, NGOs, universities, think tanks and public-private partnerships
Countries, governments and agencies they are meeting or funding
Matrix Reprogrammed route: book, dossier, evidence vault, public source, or video angle

billionaireSeedWatchlist.name: Elon Musk
billionaireSeedWatchlist.primarySource: Tesla, SpaceX, xAI and related companies
